songs.title: Bohemian Rhapsody
songs.clue: Is this the real life? Is this just fantasy?

songs.title: Sweet Caroline
songs.clue: Sweet Caroline, ba ba ba

songs.clue: Just a small town girl, living in a lonely world

songs.title: Livin' on a Prayer
songs.clue: Whoa, we're halfway there

songs.title: I Will Always Love You
songs.clue: If I should stay, I would only be in your way

songs.title: Billie Jean
songs.clue: Billie Jean is not my lover

songs.title: Hotel California
songs.clue: On a dark desert highway, cool wind in my hair

songs.title: Stairway to Heaven
songs.clue: There's a lady who's sure all that glitters is gold

songs.title: Imagine
songs.clue: Imagine there's no heaven

songs.title: Like a Rolling Stone
songs.clue: How does it feel, to be on your own?

songs.title: Smells Like Teen Spirit
songs.clue: Load up on guns, bring your friends

songs.title: Wonderwall
songs.clue: Today is gonna be the day

songs.title: Hey Jude
songs.clue: Hey Jude, don't be afraid

songs.title: Thunderstruck
songs.clue: Thunder, thunder, thunder, thunder

songs.title: Shape of You
songs.clue: The club isn't the best place to find a lover

songs.title: Uptown Funk
songs.clue: This hit, that ice cold

songs.title: Blinding Lights
songs.clue: I've been tryna call

songs.title: Watermelon Sugar
songs.clue: Tastes like strawberries on a summer evening

songs.title: Levitating
songs.clue: If you wanna run away with me, I know a galaxy

songs.title: Good 4 U
songs.clue: Well, good for you, I guess you moved on really easily

songs.title: Stay
songs.clue: I do the same thing I told you that I never would

songs.title: Heat Waves
songs.clue: Sometimes all I think about is you

songs.title: As It Was
songs.clue: Holdin' me back, gravity's holdin' me back

songs.title: Flowers
